inputs.label: Delisle Temperature

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature reading on the Delisle scale.

inputs.label: Freezing Point (Delisle)
inputs.businessContext: Delisle value at the freezing point of water (0°C). Historically 150°De.

inputs.label: Boiling Point (Delisle)
inputs.businessContext: Delisle value at the boiling point of water (100°C). Historically 0°De.

businessContext_i18n.en: Delisle value at the boiling point of water (100°C). Historically 0°De.

businessContext_i18n.de: Delisle-Wert am Siedepunkt von Wasser (100°C). Historisch 0°De.
